title: Olivrr's Papers
description: A mod that adds simple but useful documents to Minecraft. Great for Roleplay.
body:
# Olivrr's Papers: A small document mod.

**Olivrr’s Papers is an intelligently designed Minecraft mod that enhances your game play experience by inserting various papers and documents.**

This mode is majorly created for the role players as it allows you to create elaborate stories in your Minecraft world.
#
Olivrr's Papers gives you a chance to invent and use different sorts of papers – for now only IDs and Driver's Licenses, but I will add letters, diaries, contracts etc. soon.

These are some of the features that make Olivrr’s Papers remarkable:

  **Craftable Documents:** Make different types of paper using materials found in the game.

  **Customizable Text (Coming Soon, alongside contracts):** The player can put messages that are personal onto those documents..

  **Roleplay Enhancement:** A good way of adding realism and detail in a role-playing setting.

  **Easy to Use:** Recipes for craft operating together with an interface which is not complicated at all.

Please contact me immediately on Discord at olivrront if you find any bugs or have suggestions on how we can improve this mod. Feedback like yours will be helpful to us in improving Olivrr’s Papers further
